description: Ozyworld — a synthetic but realistic downstream MCP catalog used by the eval suite. Servers and tools are modeled on real MCP servers. Several servers expose similarly-named capabilities (notably 'search') so wrong-server selection is measurable, and many tools are phrased so a paraphrased intent has no lexical shortcut to the right tool.

tools.name: search_pages
tools.title: Search Confluence Pages
tools.description: Search Confluence wiki pages and blog posts by free text. Returns matching page titles and ids.

tools.name: get_page
tools.title: Get Confluence Page
tools.description: Fetch the full content of a single Confluence page by its page id.

tools.name: search_issues
tools.title: Search Jira Issues
tools.description: Search issues across Jira projects using a JQL query. Use for bug reports, tickets, and tasks.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.title: Create Jira Issue
tools.description: File a new Jira issue (bug, task, or story) in a project.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.title: Comment on Jira Issue
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing Jira issue.

tools.name: search_code
tools.title: GitHub Code Search
tools.description: Search source code across GitHub repositories by keyword and qualifiers.

tools.name: search_issues
tools.title: GitHub Issue Search
tools.description: Search GitHub issues and pull requests across repositories.

tools.name: create_pull_request
tools.title: Open a Pull Request
tools.description: Open a new pull request from a head branch into a base branch.

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.title: Read GitHub File
tools.description: Read the contents of a file at a path in a GitHub repository.

tools.name: post_message
tools.title: Post Slack Message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user so teammates are notified.

tools.name: search_messages
tools.title: Search Slack History
tools.description: Search the history of Slack messages across channels.

tools.name: list_channels
tools.title: List Slack Channels
tools.description: List the Slack channels the workspace has.

tools.name: send_email
tools.title: Send Email
tools.description: Compose and send an email message through Gmail to one or more recipients.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.title: Search Email
tools.description: Search the Gmail mailbox for messages matching a query.

tools.name: list_events
tools.title: List Calendar Events
tools.description: List upcoming events on a calendar within a time window.

tools.name: create_event
tools.title: Schedule Calendar Event
tools.description: Book a new event or meeting on a calendar with attendees and a time.

tools.name: read_file
tools.title: Read File
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem.

tools.name: write_file
tools.title: Write File
tools.description: Write or overwrite content to a file on the local filesystem, saving it for later.

tools.name: search_files
tools.title: Search Files
tools.description: Find files on disk by name pattern or by content match within a directory tree.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.title: List Directory
tools.description: List the files and subdirectories within a directory.

tools.name: run_query
tools.title: Run SQL Query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL SELECT statement against the database and return rows.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.title: List Database Tables
tools.description: List the tables and views available in the connected database schema.

tools.name: search_code
tools.title: OpenGrok Source Search
tools.description: Full-text search across an indexed source code repository for symbols and text.

tools.name: get_definition
tools.title: Find Symbol Definition
tools.description: Locate where a function, class, or symbol is defined in the indexed source.
